description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image and runs a global before_script `pip install -r requirements.txt` for all jobs. Define two stages, build and test, and add the buildâ€‘stage jobs `check_week_4_additional` (allow_failure, runs on branches matching `/^lab[-_].*4$/` except `master` and `branches@CSUI-AdvProg-2017/lab-exercises`, script `test -e week_4/week4a.py`) and `check_week_4_mandatory` (nonâ€‘failing, same branch filters, script `test -e week_4/week4.py`, `test -e week_4/test_week4.py`, `test -e week_4/m1facade.txt`). In the test stage add the grading jobs for each week, each with appropriate `allow_failure` flags, `only` regexes for their week (e.g., `grade_week_1_additional` runs on `/^lab[-_].*1$/` and executes `file week_1/form_a1.py` then `python week_1/form_a1.py`; `grade_week_1_mandatory` runs on the same regex and runs `file week_1/form_m{1,2,3}.py` and `python week_1/form_m{1,2,3}.py`; similarly `grade_week_2_additional` runs `cd week_2/factory-method-pattern && python Tutorial2-FM-Dynamic.py && cat factoryMethodPattern.txt`, `grade_week_2_mandatory` runs a series of python scripts and cat commands across factoryâ€‘method and singleton patterns; `grade_week_3_additional` runs `file week_3/a1bridge.py && python week_3/a1bridge.py`; `grade_week_3_mandatory` runs `file week_3/m1{adapter,bridge}.py && file week_3/m2{adapter,bridge}.txt && python week_3/m1{adapter,bridge}.py && cat week_3/m2{adapter,bridge}.txt`; `grade_week_4_additional` runs `python week_4/week4a.py`; `grade_week_4_mandatory` runs `python week_4/week4.py && cat week_4/m1facade.txt && python -m unittest discover week_4`; `grade_week_5_additional` runs `cd week_5 && python -m unittest tests/a1com-tests.py && python -m unittest tests/a1cor-tests.py`; `grade_week_5_mandatory` runs `cd week_5 && python -m unittest tests/m1com-tests.py && python -m unittest tests/m1cor-tests.py`; `grade_week_6_additional` runs `python week_6/additional_observer.py`; `grade_week_6_mandatory` runs `python week_6/{simple_observer,mediator,observer}.py`; `grade_week_7_additional` runs `python week_7/queue_{a1,a2}.py`; and `grade_week_7_mandatory` runs `cat week_7/queue_{m1,m2}.txt && cat week_7/futures_m1.txt && python week_7/queue_{m1,m2}.py && python week_7/futures_m1.py`). Add preparation jobs in the build stage named `prep_week_3` through `prep_week_8` that each run only on their respective week tags (e.g., `prep_week_3` runs on `/^week-3$/@CSUI-AdvProg-2017/lab-exercises` and executes `python -m flake8 --ignore=F821 week-3`; `prep_week_4` runs flake8 on `week_4`; `prep_week_5` checks existence of `week_5/README.md` then runs `python -m flake8 week_5`; similarly for weeks 6 and 7, and `prep_week_8` checks existence of `README.md`, `MANDATORY.md`, and `ADDITIONAL.md` in `week_8`). All jobs inherit the same image, have no caches, artifacts, or deployment steps, and the branch filters ensure they are skipped on `master` and the `lab-exercises` project branches.
